notes: River or stream with continuous flow. No development or site alteration within buffer.
Intermittent stream. Buffer applies during flow season.

column10: fens. Requires NSECC approval for any alteration.

notes: WSS wetlands get doubled buffer. Rare species habitat etc.
No permanent structures in 1:100 year flood plain. Area still counted in parcel but deducted from buildable.

measured_from: ordinary high water mark + wave runup
notes: Climate change flood construction level. Applies to new subdivisions after 2023.
5m setback from top of slope where slope exceeds 15% over a 3m vertical drop.
9m setback for slopes exceeding 30%. May require geotechnical report.
Minimum isolation distance between well and septic system. Critical for unserviced subdivisions.
Minimum setback from property boundary for well.
30m protection radius around well. No septic or contaminant sources within this radius.

50% of required septic field area must be reserved for replacement field. This is THE big yield killer. Not a fixed buffer — percentage of drain field area. See hrm_servicing.csv septic_field_reserve_pct.
Species-specific. Buffer varies. Requires wildlife biologist assessment. Flagged for manual review.

column8: historic archaeological sites. Buffer varies. Requires screening if in known sensitive area. Flagged for manual review.

notes: Phase I/II ESA may be required. Site remediation before subdivision approval. Buffer varies. Flagged for manual review.
